name: Filevine Legal Practice Management API
what_it_does: Filevine REST API for legal case and practice management platform. Enables AI agents to manage case and project records, access contacts and party data, retrieve document metadata, track deadlines and calendar events, manage tasks and workflows, access custom field data across practice areas, and integrate legal operations data with external billing, CRM, and communication systems.
use_cases: Managing case records and contact data from legal operations automation agents
Retrieving deadlines and statute of limitations dates from legal calendar agents
Creating and updating tasks and workflows from legal process management agents
Accessing case financial and settlement data from law firm analytics agents
not_for: Corporate legal departments without law firm case management focus
Document management without case and matter workflow requirements
In-house counsel without client and opposing party management needs
best_when: A personal injury, mass tort, or litigation law firm using Filevine wants AI agents to automate case intake, deadline tracking, document management, and client communication workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY+PRIVILEGE: Case files contain attorney-client privileged communications and sensitive client personal and medical data. All integrations must maintain privilege protections and comply with state bar regulations.

auth.notes: Filevine uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Firm-level credentials. Developer portal with sandbox environment. Scopes control access to case data, contacts, documents, and financial data.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — legal practice management enterprise pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-user monthly pricing; enterprise contracts for large firms
pricing.notes: Salt Lake City, Utah. Founded 2013. Strong in personal injury and mass tort litigation. AI-native features for legal intake and document analysis. Significant venture backing.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY+PRIVILEGE: Attorney-client privilege applies to case communications — never expose to unauthorized parties
HIPAA compliance required for personal injury cases with medical records
No public MCP server — REST API with OAuth2
US data residency only — verify for international law firm offices
Custom field schema varies by practice area — API data model differs per firm configuration
Case data includes sensitive medical and financial settlement information
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY+PRIVILEGE: Attorney-client privileged data and sensitive medical/financial information. SOC2, HIPAA. OAuth2 with firm-level scoping. US data residency only.

security_score_components.security_notes: Attorney-client privileged and medical data. SOC2, HIPAA. OAuth2. US data residency only.
